distance_km.note: Multiple sources confirm the main race distance is 42km. Source [1] states '42km libre', source [2] lists '42km' as the primary distance offered, and source [3] confirms '42 km' as available.

elevation_m.note: No web sources in search results provide specific elevation gain data. Source [1] mentions 'Le parcours est difficile physiquement avec de belles portions de montées' (the course is physically difficult with nice climbing sections) but does not quantify elevation gain.

country.note: Multiple sources confirm France as the country. Source [2] states the race 'se déroule tous les hivers sur le magnifique plateau de Champagny-le-Haut, en Savoie' (takes place every winter on the magnificent plateau of Champagny-le-Haut, in Savoie).

region_state_province.note: Sources specify the race is in Savoie, which is part of the Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes region. However, the database claim lists only 'Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes' without the specific department. Source [2] and [3] both state 'Savoie'. Source [3] provides full address: '73350 Champagny-en-Vanoise' where 73 is the Savoie department code.

discipline.note: Source [1] explicitly states 'Marathon du Grand Bec (libre)' indicating freestyle/libre format, not exclusively skate. Source [2] describes it as 'ski nordique' (cross-country skiing) without specifying skate-only. The 'libre' designation typically means both classic and skate techniques are permitted.

typical_participants.note: No web sources in search results provide specific participant numbers or field size data. Source [2] describes it as 'une grande course populaire' (a large popular race) but does not quantify typical starters.

year_founded.note: No web sources in search results provide the founding year or first edition date. Source [4] mentions '12ème édition' (12th edition) in a YouTube video title, but the video date is not provided in the search results, making it impossible to calculate the founding year.

official_website.note: Source [1] provides the official website URL: 'www.marathondugrandbec.com'. This is confirmed by source [2] which is from that domain.

typical_race_date.note: Multiple sources confirm February as the typical race date. Source [1] states '22 février : Marathon du Grand Bec (libre)' and source [2] confirms 'Le 22 février 2026'. Source [8] also confirms 'Le rendez-vous est pris pour le dimanche 22 février 2026'.
